hero.title: YouTube subscriptions, finally organized
hero.description: QuickTube Organizer helps you group your YouTube subscriptions for easy access in the sidebar

features.label: Built for people who follow hundreds of channels

items.title: Drag to organize
items.text: Drag channels into categories, reorder them freely, what you see is what you get.

items.title: Icons and colors
items.text: Add custom icons and colors so each group is easy to spot at a glance.

items.title: Multi-select
items.text: Select multiple channels at once for efficient batch operations.

items.question: Is QuickTube Organizer free?
items.answer: Yes, it's free to use. You can create more than 10 groups and customize icons and colors after purchasing Pro.

items.question: Which platform does it support?
items.answer: It is currently built as a Chrome extension but will be available for other browsers in the future.

items.question: Do I need an account to use it?
items.answer: No. There is no separate account, signup flow, or extra service to connect.

cta.title: Organize your subscriptions in minutes
cta.description: Install QuickTube Organizer and make your YouTube sidebar cleaner, calmer, and easier to use.
